title: Non-empty statements should change control flow or have at least one side effect
message: Non-empty statement should change control flow or have at least one side effect.

noncompliant.description: A function with a non-empty statement that doesn't change control flow or have a side effect.

compliant.description: A function with a non-empty statement that changes control flow or has a side effect.

why_is_this_an_issue: Non-empty statements that don't change control flow or have a side effect can increase code complexity and make it harder to reason about the program's behavior.
how_to_fix: Remove unnecessary statements or add a side effect or control flow change to the non-empty statements.

logic.logic.new_check_type_doc: Checks if the expression has a side effect by checking if it modifies a mutable object or calls a function with known side effects.

function_code:
def has_side_effect(node):
    import ast
    from ast import Call
    from ast import BinOp
    from ast import Name
    from ast import List
    from ast import Store
    from ast import AugAssign
    from ast import FunctionDef
    from ast import If
    from ast import For
    from ast import While
    from ast import With
    from ast import Try
    from ast import Except
    from ast import Raise
    from ast import Assign
    from ast import Module
    from collections import deque
    side_effect_functions = set([
        'print',
        'input',
        'len',
        'format',
        'str',
        'bool',
        'int',
        'float',
        'complex',
        'round',
        'abs',
        'pow',
        'sum',
        'min',
        'max',
        'any',
        'all',
        'enumerate',
        'zip',
        'sorted',
        'list',
        'tuple',
        'set',
        'dict',
        'open',
        'os.system',
        'time.sleep'    ])
    mutable_objects = set(['list', 'dict', 'set'])
    call_stacks = deque([[
        node
    ]])
    while len(call_stacks) > 0:
        current_node = call_stacks[-1]
        if isinstance(current_node, Module):
            call_stacks.pop()
            continue
        elif isinstance(current_node, Call):
            call_stack = call_stacks.pop()
            call_stack.append(current_node)
            if current_node.func.id in side_effect_functions or isinstance(current_node.func.args[0], Name) and current_node.func.args[0].id in mutable_objects:
                return True
        elif isinstance(current_node, BinOp) or isinstance(current_node, AugAssign) or isinstance(current_node, Store) or isinstance(current_node, FunctionDef) or isinstance(current_node, If) or isinstance(current_node, For) or isinstance(current_node, While) or isinstance(current_node, With) or isinstance(current_node, Try) or isinstance(current_node, Except) or isinstance(current_node, Raise) or isinstance(current_node, Assign):
            call_stacks.append(current_node)
    return False

metadata.title: Non-empty statements should change control flow or have at least one side effect
